reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio con combustibles líquidos de la empresa ypf.  Hay un minimercado y la atención es excelente... en mi caso yo recurri a ellos para guiarme y por demás amables.
Felicitaciones a la empresa por esta calidad de personal pocas veces visto.

(Translated by Google)
YPF gas station with liquid fuels. There's a convenience store and the service is excellent... I used their help for directions and they were incredibly helpful.
Congratulations to the company for this quality of staff, which is rarely seen.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3918729990868918457/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRMnEySWZnEAE
